scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check server.mjs && node --check backend/api.mjs && node --check backend/http.mjs && node --check backend/security.mjs && node --check backend/store.mjs && node --check scripts/api-smoke-test.mjs && node --check scripts/load-test.mjs && node --check scripts/setup-uat-data.mjs && node --check scripts/check-uat-browser.mjs && node --check scripts/check-java-proxy-mode.mjs && node --check scripts/check-security-hardening.mjs && node --check scripts/check-ui-panel-contracts.mjs && node --check scripts/check-browser-regression.mjs && powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-ChildItem scripts/*.ps1 | ForEach-Object { $tokens=$null; $errors=$null; [System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile($_.FullName,[ref]$tokens,[ref]$errors) > $null; if ($errors.Count) { $errors | ForEach-Object { Write-Error $_ }; exit 1 } }" && node scripts/check-mobile-foundation.mjs && node scripts/check-java-proxy-mode.mjs && node scripts/check-ui-panel-contracts.mjs && npm.cmd run java:test
